backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a doctor queue management system with admin-gated functions for managing departments, employees, queues, visitor check-ins, and admin logs using in-memory Maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a single feature (fixing TypeScript/build errors across all frontend pages and components) to its affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of three frontend source files: App.tsx, AdminDashboard.tsx, and SuperAdminDashboard.tsx.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens including colors, radius, chart colors, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app at #root and loading the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps the tree in AppProvider, and enforces role-based access guards via beforeLoad redirects.
Shared layout wrapper for dashboard pages that composes Navbar and Sidebar with responsive sidebar toggle state and a main content area.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, landing page nav links, language switcher, theme toggle, notification dropdown, and user account/logout menu.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Role-aware collapsible sidebar that renders navigation items based on the authenticated user's role, with a mobile overlay and smooth slide-in transition.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via TanStack Query, using the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor interactions including departments, employees, queues, and visitor check-ins, with automatic polling and cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a medical teal/green theme in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/AppContext.tsx: Global React context provider managing authenticated user state, language, theme (light/dark), and in-app notifications with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Defines user role types and AuthUser interface, with utility functions for storing/retrieving the authenticated user in localStorage and resolving role-based dashboard paths.
frontend/src/lib/i18n.ts: Provides English and Tamil translation dictionaries for all UI strings used throughout the MediQueue application.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports utility functions for merging Tailwind class names, formatting minutes into human-readable time strings, and generating ordinal suffixes for numbers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying clinic stats, a weekly patient bar chart, doctor management table with toggle/add functionality, department management, and admin activity logs using tabs. Fetches departments and logs via React Query hooks and uses mock doctor data with local state.
frontend/src/pages/DoctorDashboard.tsx: Doctor dashboard page for managing a patient queue, showing current patient being served, waiting list, and stat cards. Supports next, complete, skip, and emergency actions on mock patient data with React Query integration for queue fetching.
frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, feature cards, stats, and navigation buttons to login/register. Uses i18n for translations and displays a hero illustration with floating UI elements.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page with email/password form that authenticates against hardcoded demo accounts and redirects to the appropriate role-based dashboard. Includes password visibility toggle and error display.
frontend/src/pages/PatientDashboard.tsx: Patient dashboard for joining a clinic queue by selecting department and queue, displaying an active token with estimated wait time, and showing visit history. Simulates position polling and triggers notifications when the patient's turn is near.
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: Registration page component with a form collecting name, email, password, and role fields, performing basic validation and simulating user creation before redirecting to the role-appropriate dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/SuperAdminDashboard.t: Super Admin dashboard page displaying platform-wide stats (clinics, doctors, patients, revenue) with a clinic management table supporting toggle activation, a revenue line chart, and tabs for admin logs and departments.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/display font families, border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, with dark mode and container query support.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file describing the Smart Doctor Queue Management System's architecture, tech stack, existing features, known issues, and versioning for build planning purposes.
